---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for xiaozhi-bridge
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this feature solve? Why is it important?

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case

Describe a concrete use case or scenario.

## Implementation Sketch (optional)

If you have technical ideas on how to implement, share them:

- Which files/modules are affected
- Interface/API design
- Backward compatibility concerns

## Priority

- [ ] Critical (blocks V1)
- [ ] High (needed for V2)
- [ ] Medium (V3+)
- [ ] Low (nice-to-have)
